Bonus Email Themeplate: The Humble Hero
Has your fear around the blinking cursor kept you from making clear, direct offers to
your email list?
If you’ve gone silent or recently made a pivot - the BEST way to warm up your list and
start adding value isn’t to feed them a bunch of random free content - but to be clear
and direct with whether or not you can help them.
Don’t come blasting out of the gates with urgency and scarcity. Instead, open the door
for a more elegant sales conversation that can capture your “most aware” prospects -
while putting everyone else on notice as to what you do and who you can help.
When to send this email:
1. If it’s been weeks or months since you’ve made a clear, direct offer.
2. If you’ve been sending free content (podcasts, blog posts, videos, etc.) for so
long that your subscribers may not even know how you can serve them more
deeply.
3. If you’ve made a pivot in your business (who you serve / how you serve them)...
and want to pull out the most qualified subscribers.
How to write this email:
[Lead with a clear and direct value proposition]
[Credibility bombs that back up your ability to deliver that value]
[Transparency around why you’ve gone silent]
[Commit to overcoming your block to serve your audience]
[Reaffirm your value prop]
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

[CTA for your most aware subscribers]
[PS: Segment your list by giving an “out” to people who aren’t qualified to work with you]
Example - Dan Martell
About:
Dan is a world-class SaaS coach, three-time tech founder (most recently Clarity.fm) and
an early investor/advisor to companies like Intercom, Unbounce and Hootsuite.
He’s a model of consistency -- producing over 100 episodes of his weekly Growth
Stacking Show.
WIth such a steady dose of high-value content, it became easy for subscribers to either
forget how he can help in a more direct way -- or never even be aware in the first place.
The “Humble Hero” was part of a 3-part email sequence designed to:
1. Announce Dan’s value prop in a clear, direct, non-ambiguous way.
2. Make it easy for subscribers - both new and old -- to know how he can help
3. Invite qualified (most aware) leads to take the next step
4. Plant a seed for qualified (but lesser aware) leads
5. Segment out unqualified leads
Subject Line Options:
took me 3 years to write these 9 words
Body:
Hey, my name’s Dan, and…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

I help growth-minded SaaS founders scale from 10K+ in MRR to 1M ARR
Damn.
Took me long enough to say that.
Even reading it out loud right before I hit “send” was enough to make my palms drip all
over the macbook.
And it’s kinda funny.
Despite...
… starting, scaling and exiting 3 software companies in under 10 years.
… being an early investor and growth advisor for big time success stories like Udemy,
Unbounce, Hootsuite and Intercom.
… partnering with over 50 founders in SaaS Academy (my high level coaching program)
to create life-changing outcomes…
I still couldn’t say those 9 words with a straight face.
Without a crippling dose of “who the f*ck am I to coach others” imposter syndrome.
To this day, bragging about client wins and putting myself front and center as the “SaaS
Coach” still makes me a little uncomfortable.
But if I’m in a position to help you…
I’m absolutely unwilling to let my discomfort get in the way of your growth.
Cause the truth is, despite my reluctance to claim the “coaching” mantle…
I’m damn good at what I do.
The results speak for themselves.
And if you're already at 10K+ in MRR (congrats)...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

Nothing is more important to me right now, then helping you scale your software
business while BECOMING the kind of founder capable of leading that ascent.
If that’s you… we’re long overdue for a chat.
Thanks for inspiring me to step up,
Dan
PS. If you’re not yet at 10K+ in MRR, no problem.
I’m grateful to have you as part of the family, and will continue to produce amazing
content and trainings to help get you there faster.
Just let me know here so I know not to bug you with SaaS Academy openings.
But if you’ve already surpassed $10K+ in MRR and want help scaling way beyond that
THIS Year…
I’m *officially* here to help.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 4 --
